title: Move theme system from pew_pew_plaza to turbo_widgets
description: The pew_pew_plaza app contains a theme system (TColors, TSizes, TTexts, TDecorations, TProvider, TThemeMode, TTheme, CustomColorScheme, TGradient, TFontFamilies) that all of the showcase widgets depend on. This theme system currently uses Dart `part of` files coupled to a single t_provider.dart. This task breaks that coupling and moves the theme system into turbo_widgets as standalone files so the widgets can function independently of pew_pew_plaza.
context:
In pew_pew_plaza, the theme system is structured like this:
- `lib/core/ui/widgets/t_provider.dart` — an InheritedWidget that provides TColors, TSizes, TTexts, TDecorations, TData, TThemeMode, TTools, TBreakpointConfig to the widget tree
- `lib/core/ui/models/t_colors.dart` — `part of '../widgets/t_provider.dart'` — static color constants + instance getters that resolve through ShadCN's color scheme
- `lib/core/ui/models/t_sizes.dart` — `part of '../widgets/t_provider.dart'` — static size constants + instance getters using context.media
- `lib/core/ui/models/t_texts.dart` — `part of '../widgets/t_provider.dart'` — text style getters using ShadCN text theme + FontFamily from generated code
- `lib/core/ui/widgets/t_decorations.dart` — `part of 't_provider.dart'` — decoration presets (shadows, borders, gradients)
- `lib/core/ui/enums/t_theme_mode.dart` — dark/light enum with isDark/isLight + a large themeData getter that builds ShadThemeData
- `lib/core/ui/enums/t_theme.dart` — TTheme model wrapping ShadCN + Material themes
- `lib/core/ui/widgets/t_gradient.dart` — TGradient and TGradientRadial classes
- `lib/core/state/typedefs/lazy_locator_def.dart` — typedef LazyLocatorDef<T> = T Function()
- `lib/core/shared/typedefs/update_current_def.dart` — typedef UpdateCurrentDef<T> = T Function(T cValue)

turbo_widgets already has TData, TDeviceType, TBreakpointConfig, TTools in `lib/src/responsive/`. The theme types reference those.
instructions: Read the dev-conventions skill files before starting: `~/.claude/skills/dev-conventions/conventions/class-structure.md`, `~/.claude/skills/dev-conventions/conventions/constants.md`, `~/.claude/skills/dev-conventions/conventions/extensions.md`, `~/.claude/skills/dev-conventions/conventions/abstracts.md`
Update this task status to 'in-progress' immediately.
Read ALL source files listed in the context section from pew_pew_plaza to understand the full shape of each type.
Read turbo_widgets `lib/src/responsive/` files to understand existing TData, TDeviceType, TBreakpointConfig, TTools so you don't duplicate them.
Read the existing turbo_widgets barrel file `lib/turbo_widgets.dart` and `pubspec.yaml` to understand what's already exported.
Create `lib/src/theme/` directory in turbo_widgets with these standalone files (NO part/part of):
- t_font_families.dart: static string constants for JetBrainsMono, Manrope, Inter (replacing generated FontFamily class)

- t_theme_mode.dart: the TThemeMode enum with isDark/isLight. DO NOT include the themeData getter — that stays in pew_pew_plaza as an extension. DO include the materialThemeMode and systemUiOverlayStyle getters.
- t_theme.dart: TTheme model with lazy ShadTextTheme, ShadThemeData, TThemeMode, TextTheme, ThemeData. Replace LazyLocatorDef<T> with inline T Function() typedef or create the typedef.
- t_gradient.dart: TGradient and TGradientRadial classes (straight copy, no pew_pew imports)
- custom_color_scheme.dart: CustomColorScheme extending ShadColorScheme with light/dark constructors. It references TColors static constants — import them.

- t_colors.dart: Break from part file into standalone. Keep ALL static constants AND ALL instance getters. Import ShadCN, TThemeMode, color_extension, TGradient. Replace `context.theme` with a constructor-injected TTheme. Replace `context.renderBox` and `context.media` in TSizes similarly.

- t_sizes.dart: Break from part file into standalone. Keep ALL static constants AND ALL instance getters. Constructor takes BuildContext and TDeviceType. Replace `context.media` with MediaQuery.of(context), `context.renderBox` with `(context.findRenderObject() as RenderBox?)`.

- t_texts.dart: Break from part file into standalone. Replace FontFamily.jetBrainsMono/inter with TFontFamilies.jetBrainsMono/inter. Import TColors, TSizes, TTheme from turbo_widgets paths. Replace `copyWithCurrent` usage with the extension from text_style_extension (handled by task 2).
- t_decorations.dart: Break from part file into standalone. Import TDeviceType, TThemeMode, TColors, TSizes, TGradient.
- t_provider.dart: The InheritedWidget. Import all theme types. Keep the exact same shape — TColors, TSizes, TDecorations, TTexts, TData, TThemeMode, TTools, TBreakpointConfig fields.
Create `lib/src/typedefs/t_lazy_locator_def.dart` with `typedef TLazyLocatorDef<T extends Object> = T Function();`
Create `lib/src/typedefs/t_update_current_def.dart` with `typedef TUpdateCurrentDef<T> = T Function(T cValue);`
All imports within these new files must use `package:turbo_widgets/src/...` paths — never reference pew_pew_plaza.
Do NOT add exports to the barrel file yet — that is handled by task 9.
Do NOT modify pew_pew_plaza — that is handled by task 10.
acceptance_criteria: All theme files exist in `lib/src/theme/` as standalone Dart files (no part/part of)
TFontFamilies class exists with static const String values for JetBrainsMono, Manrope, Inter
TThemeMode does NOT contain the themeData getter (that stays app-side)
TProvider InheritedWidget has the same public API shape as the pew_pew_plaza version
No file imports anything from pew_pew_plaza
All files use package:turbo_widgets/src/ internal imports for cross-references
Typedef files exist for TLazyLocatorDef and TUpdateCurrentDef
constraints: Do NOT change any public API surface — preserve method signatures, field names, types exactly
Do NOT add exports to turbo_widgets.dart — task 9 does that
Do NOT touch pew_pew_plaza files — task 10 does that
Do NOT refactor or improve code — straight move with minimal import adjustments
goals: The theme infrastructure exists in turbo_widgets as clean, standalone files
Widget files created in later tasks can import these theme types from turbo_widgets paths
non_goals: Making the theme system more generic or configurable
Adding tests for theme types (they are UI configuration, not business logic)
worklog: Created 12 files total. Theme files (10) in lib/src/theme/: t_font_families.dart (static string constants for JetBrainsMono/Inter/Manrope), t_theme_mode.dart (enum with isDark/isLight/materialThemeMode/systemUiOverlayStyle — themeData getter excluded), custom_color_scheme.dart (extracted from original t_theme_mode.dart, references TColors statics), t_theme.dart (lazy theme model using TLazyLocatorDef), t_gradient.dart (LinearGradient/RadialGradient subclasses), t_colors.dart (all static constants + instance getters, context.theme replaced with constructor-injected TTheme), t_sizes.dart (all static constants + instance getters, context.media replaced with MediaQuery.of(context), context.renderBox replaced with context.findRenderObject() as RenderBox?), t_texts.dart (FontFamily replaced with TFontFamilies, imports t_text_style_extension from task 2 path), t_decorations.dart (imports all theme types from turbo_widgets paths), t_provider.dart (InheritedWidget with same public API shape). Typedef files (2) in lib/src/typedefs/: t_lazy_locator_def.dart, t_update_current_def.dart. All files use package:turbo_widgets/src/ internal imports. No barrel exports added. No pew_pew_plaza files modified. TColors and TTexts import t_color_extension.dart and t_text_style_extension.dart respectively — these will be created by task 2.

on_complete.update_downstream_tasks: Add any corrections, discovered dependencies, or context that would help tasks 3-8 succeed — append to their context, never change existing content.
